How revenue teams turn signal into pipeline

From intent detection to outbound execution, SignalAI connects buying signals directly to revenue workflows.

Signal Detection

Identify high-intent accounts early

Monitor behavioral and firmographic signals across your market to identify companies actively researching your category.

  • Behavioral signal tracking
  • Intent spike detection
  • ICP match filtering
  • AI scoring engine
  • Account prioritization
  • Fit & engagement modeling
Signal Intelligence

Score accounts automatically

SignalAI analyzes intent signals in real time and ranks accounts based on engagement, fit, and buying probability.

Workflow Automation

Trigger outbound sequences

When signals spike, automatically launch multi-channel sequences so your team reaches buyers at the perfect moment.

  • Automated sequence triggers
  • Multi-channel outreach
  • SDR notifications
  • Territory routing
  • SDR assignment
  • CRM pipeline sync
Revenue Routing

Send opportunities to the right team

Accounts are routed automatically to SDRs or account owners based on territory, segment, and deal stage.

Signals → Scoring → Outreach → Pipeline
Security & Compliance

Deploy with confidence encrypted at every layer

SignalAI is built for modern revenue teams operating in regulated environments with encryption, access controls, and auditability designed in from day one.

Encryption in transit & at rest SSO / SCIM ready Audit logs & retention
Encryption layer

TLS in transit, AES-256 at rest, and optional key rotation for enterprise environments.

Access controls

SSO/SAML support, SCIM provisioning, and role-based permissions for every workflow and team.

Auditability

Immutable audit logs, configurable retention, and export-ready reporting for compliance and review.

Secure runtime

Hardened infrastructure, least-privilege services, and isolated execution designed for scale and safety.
